_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform integrated quality assurance testing for security functionality and resiliency attack.
reference_document_element_description: Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, including adversarial robustness testing, prompt injection testing, and supply chain verification.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-018 (DQ, cosine: 0.539), DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.678). Shared vocabulary: [security, testing]. DCWF-only terms [assurance, attack, functionality, integrated, perform, quality] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.892, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Perform integrated quality assurance testing for security functionality and resi" and "Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.543 < STS 0.678 (gap -0.135). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [assurance, attack, functionality] and [adversarial, ai, chain] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [security, testing]. DCWF-only: [assurance, attack, functionality, integrated, perform, quality]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection].
